zh.Ascot, Buckinghamshire, England: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加巴-卡納達巴金哈姆阿斯可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Pelham Dormer於1536年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加巴-卡納達巴金哈姆阿斯可特時，她的父親Sir William Dormer, KB, MP22歲，母親Mary Sidney19歲。她於大約1558年與Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年在比利時布拉班特洛文享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Pelham Dormer于1536年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加巴-卡納達巴金哈姆阿斯可特时，她的父亲Sir William Dormer, KB, MP22岁，母亲Mary Sidney19岁。她于大约1558年与Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年在比利时布拉班特洛文享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dormer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a lazy man or a sleepyhead from Old French dormeur ‘sleeper, sluggard’ (from Latin dormitor, from dormire ‘to sleep’).

Irish (Kilkenny): when not of the same origin as 1 above, this is a shortened Anglicized form of the Donegal name Ó Díorma, a shortened form of Ó Duibhdhíormaigh ‘descendant of Duibhdhíormach’, a personal name composed of Gaelic dubh ‘black’ + díormach ‘trooper’.
German (Dörmer): occupational name for a watchman on a tower (of a castle or town), from an agent derivative of Middle Low German torn or Middle High German turn ‘tower’. Compare Dermer and Dorner .

variants.name: Dermer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hersh, Pinchas, Yaffa.
German: from an old personal name, Terrimar, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
German: variant of Dörmer (see Dormer ), an occupational name for a watchman, someone who manned a tower. Compare Derner .

variants.name: Dearmond
meanings: Irish: variant of Dermond, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiorma ‘descendant of Duibhdhiorma’ a personal name meaning ‘black trooper’ (see Dormer 2). There has been some confusion between the personal names Duibhdhiorma and Diarmaid, so that Dearmond alternates with McDermott . See also Dearman 2.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from a place in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēo(t)la + hām ‘homestead’. From 1715 a family bearing this surname held the dukedom of Newcastle.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Pelham Dormer was born in 1536, in Ascot, Buckingham, Lower Canada, British Colonial America, her father, Sir William Dormer, KB, MP, was 22 and her mother, Mary Sidney, was 19. She married Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley about 1558, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1603, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Pelham Dormer est née en 1536, à Ascot, Buckingham, Bas-Canada, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Sir William Dormer, KB, MP, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Sidney, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley environ 1558, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1603, à Leuven, Brabant, Belgique, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Pelham Dormer è nata il nel 1536 nel Ascot, Buckingham, Bas-Canada, British Colonial America, sua padre, Sir William Dormer, KB, MP, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mary Sidney, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley circa 1558, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Pelham Dormerが1536年にイギリス植民地アメリカバス-カナダブクインガムアスコトで生まれた時，父Sir William Dormer, KB, MPは22歳，母Mary Sidneyは19歳であった。約1558年にイギリスイギリスでSir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年にベルギーブラバントレウベンで67歳で死去した。

ko.Ascot, Buckinghamshire, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 바스-캔아다 벅잉함 아스컷
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Pelham Dormer(이)가 1536년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 바스-캔아다 벅잉함 아스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Dormer, KB, MP(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Sidney(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1558년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ascot, Buckinghamshire, England: аскот, буккингхам, бас-канада, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Pelham Dormer родилась в 1536 г. в местности аскот, буккингхам, бас-канада, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Sir William Dormer, KB, MP было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Sidney, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley около 1558 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1603 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 67 лет.
